title: The Pyramids & the Builder Grid
summary: Who built them and what they do — Thoth's Avian builders, calendar computers in stone, ley-line portal markers, and the war that brought the network down.
markdown:
**The Pyramids** anchor the record's deep history: across ten sessions, whenever the
account reaches far enough back, it arrives at pyramidal structures — and at the question
of their builders.

The record's answer names names. In the December 21, 2020 session: *"Construction of
ancient structure AI network was created by Hyperdimensional being known as the Avian
race, Thoth, in Egypt... They are the ancestors of the ancient builders that predate your
civilization."* The purpose is machinery, not monument: the February 2023
[downloads](/lore/historical-download/) describe *"monolith such as pyramidal structure"*
that *"allow you, the user, to walk from one parallel world to the next"* — portal
markers on the [ley-line grid](/lore/ley-lines/), kin to the *"Calendar Structures that
you call Temples"* of [Cambodia](/lore/cambodia/). [Baramay's](/lore/baramay/) own
teaching folds the community's practice into the same lineage: Angkor Wat and the Great
Pyramid of Giza, *"the same fundamental function."*

And the network has a fall. The September 2020 [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/) session
recounts *"the war between the Atlantis Egyptian empire with the Agartha Kingdom of Rama"*
— the conflict that *"caused the downfall of the different Pyramid structure network."*
In the record's telling, the pyramids are not ruins of something primitive but
switched-off terminals of something better: a planetary machine still standing, waiting
on the grid to come back up.
